# K-MarketInsight — Korean Stock Market Event Signals

> AI-parsed DART (Korea's SEC) filing analysis platform.
> Classifies corporate disclosures into event types (Earnings, Dilution, Contract, M&A, etc.)
> and provides historical signal statistics for quantitative research.

## Site

- Homepage: https://k-marketinsight.com
- Signal Feed (Earnings): https://k-marketinsight.com/korea-earnings-signals
- Signal Feed (Dilution): https://k-marketinsight.com/korea-dilution-filings
- Signal Feed (Contracts): https://k-marketinsight.com/korea-contract-signals
- API Docs: https://k-marketinsight.com/api-docs
- Datasets: https://k-marketinsight.com/datasets
- API Access: https://k-marketinsight.com/api-access

## Data

- Source: DART (Data Analysis, Retrieval and Transfer System) — Korea's official corporate disclosure system
- Coverage: KOSPI + KOSDAQ listed companies
- Event types: EARNINGS, DILUTION, CONTRACT, BUYBACK, MNA, LEGAL, CAPEX, EXECUTIVE_CHANGE
- Signal pages: https://k-marketinsight.com/signal/{uuid}

## API

- Base URL: https://k-marketinsight.com/api/v1/
- Authentication: x-api-key header
- Docs: https://k-marketinsight.com/api-docs

## Contact

- Website: https://k-marketinsight.com
